That’s according to La Repubblica, relayed by Il Napolista, who report Napoli could make their move next summer if Kvaratskhelia ends up departing. arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk has revealed he is “constantly shouting” at Liverpool teammate Ryan Gravenberch, praising the midfielder for the development he’s undergone this season. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from the Liverpool captain today made to Viaplay, in which he was keen to praise his fellow Dutchman.
